title: Fixing React Memoized Component Re-renders Due to Changing Array References

statement.markdown: Write a React memoized component that updates only when its props change. However, the component re-renders unnecessarily when the array props' references change. Fix the bug to prevent unnecessary re-renders.
statement.inputFormat: Input is an array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: Output is the sum of the array elements.
statement.notes: Use the `useMemo` hook to memoize the sum of the array elements.

examples.explanation: The sum of the array elements is 15.
The sum of the array elements is 150.

hints.text: Use the `useMemo` hook to memoize the sum of the array elements.

solutions.python:
import sys
import time

class SumArray:
    def __init__(self):
        pass

    def sum_array(self, nums):
        start_time = time.time()
        memoized_sum = sum(nums)
        end_time = time.time()
        print(f'Sum: {memoized_sum}, Time: {end_time - start_time}', file = sys.stdout)
        return memoized_sum
